title: cyclostemon zeylanicus
intro: Cyclostemon zeylanicus, also known as Ceylonese cyclostemon, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyclostemon zeylanicus include reducing fever and alleviating pain, as well as exhibiting potential anti-cancer and antimicrobial properties. Cyclostemon zeylanicus is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, and its leaves are used in traditional medicine in various parts of the world.
